consistency.level: Consistent with standard D&D 5e spell structure. Level 2 Evocation.
consistency.range_and_area: Clear range (60 feet) and defined area of effect (15-foot-radius sphere).
consistency.components: Standard V, M components listed with necessary material details.
consistency.duration: Standard Concentration duration (up to 10 minutes) is appropriate for this type of persistent effect.
consistency.class_availability: Appropriate for Sorcerer, Warlock, and Wizard.

quality.clarity: The description is highly detailed and clear, covering crucial mechanical interactions (darkvision, nonmagical light, object interaction, and dispelling lower-level light sources).
quality.completeness: All necessary mechanical elements (effect, area, counter-measures, source movement) are fully documented.

mechanics.core_effect: Creates 15ft radius of magical darkness. This darkness blocks darkvision and nonmagical light.
mechanics.interaction_with_light: Explicitly handles interaction with light sources: dispels light spells of 2nd level or lower, and is blocked by opaque objects covering the source.
mechanics.mobility: Allows the darkness to move if attached to an object being carried/held, which is a vital mechanical note.
